propositions: Freeze a versioned outcome corpus (one row per reviewed ticket) with event-derived counts and a post_claim_edit_class taxonomy, plus land the SOTA report as its provenance and re-verify the report's §5 headline claims.

On-disk active+.retired event scanning is insufficient for compacted tickets whose CREATE/STATUS events were folded into SNAPSHOTs, so a full git-object walk across tickets-branch refs is the required primary recovery path.

The finding-adjudication TP/FP corpus was invalidated because its adjudicate.py labeling was tool-less and truncated plan text at 6000 chars, diverging from production's whole-plan agentic grounded review; 79% of labels are contaminated.

The human adjudication is also invalidated because disputes were selected by the faulty A/B rater process and the human was anchored on truncated, ungrounded rationales, evidenced by the S001 hand-adjudication error.
LLM inter-rater kappa decayed with sample size (0.74→0.60→0.50) indicating genuinely moderate agreement, so kappa is reported honestly as disclosure rather than used as a ship/discard gate.

E1 is rescoped to its valid deliverables (SOTA report, outcome corpus, reusable unlabeled finding sample) while the finding-level TP/FP gold set is descoped to idea e59d-c078-724d-46e5 for future rebuild.
